Prof. Dr. Gökhan S. Hotamışlıgil and Assoc. Prof. Dr. Canan Dağdeviren on the List of the World’s Most Influential Scientists

In the list of the most influential scientists created by a team based in the United States and the Netherlands using the scientific impact index, which consists of variables such as the number of scientific articles, number of citations, and author order, in 22 main branches of science and 176 sub-branches of science, Kadir Has University Board of Trustees Members

and

Assoc. Prof.. Dr. Canan

Dağdeviren

also took part.

serves as the James Stevens Simmons Professor of Genetics and Metabolism at Harvard University School of Medicine.

Assoc. Prof.. Dr. Canan Dağdeviren

He continues his research at the Media Lab of M.I.T. (Massachusetts Institute of Technology) and is also a member of the Harvard University Young Academicians.

For detailed information:

https://elsevier.digitalcommonsdata.com/datasets/btchxktzyw/6
